title: Happy.appの開発状況を調べて、残タスクを教えて
summary_text: **`test-auth-reentry.js` に追加する assertion（task query restoration）** ```js const taskOnlyState = readResumeStateFromSearch("?task=task-reauth-1", { activeScreen: "tasks", activeTaskFilter: "in-progress", activeTaskId: null, returnTo: "/happy/", }); assert(taskOnlyState.activeScreen === "tasks", "task-only query should retain fallback tasks screen"); assert(taskOnlyState.activeTaskId === "task-reauth-1", "task-only query should restore task id"); const unknownScreenTaskState = readResumeStateFromSearch("?screen=unknown&task=task-reauth-2", { activeScreen: "tasks", activeTaskFilter: "in-progress", activeTaskId: null, returnTo: "/happy/", }); assert(unknownScreenTaskState.activeScreen === "happy", "unknown screen should normalize to happy"); assert(unknownScreenTaskState.activeTaskId === "task-reauth-2", "task id should survive screen normalization"); ``` **`test-workspace-launcher.js` に追加する assertion（cockpit alias param preservation）** ```js assert(plan.url.includes("workspace=company"), "workspace launcher should include workspace key in cockpit url"); assert( plan.url.includes("workspaceLabel=%E4%BC%9A%E7%A4%BE%E7%B4%B9%E4%BB%8B%E3%82%B9%E3%83%A9%E3%82%A4%E3%83%89"), "workspace launcher should include encoded workspace label in cockpit url" ); assert(plan.hasExternalBridge === true, "cockpit bridge plan should stay on external bridge mode"); ``` ```js assert( cockpitRoute.includes("const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);"), "cockpit alias route should read incoming params" ); assert( cockpitRoute.includes("target.search = params.toString();"), "cockpit alias route should forward incoming params without dropping aliases" ); assert( !cockpitRoute.includes("params.delete("), "cockpit alias route should not strip alias params" ); ```
